data.contextJson: {"purpose":"Multi-agent AI operating system for building and shipping online businesses. Contains 9 specialized agents (SENTINEL, VIGIL, HELIOS, FORGE, PRISM, ANVIL, BEACON, SCRIBE, LEDGER), project files, decision records, and sprint tracking.","workflows":[],"keyFiles":[],"preferences":"Always read STATE.md before acting. Follow agent chain of command: SENTINEL → VIGIL → HELIOS → FORGE → ANVIL → BEACON → SCRIBE. Never skip FORGE before ANVIL. Respect CONSTITUTION.md as immutable. Use YAML frontmatter on all new notes. Direct, military-brevity communication style."}
